---
title: "Instructor Only: Difference Plots Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
prams <- read_csv("data/real/prams_2011_selected.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

state_overall <- prams |>
  filter(
    subgroup_cat == "None",
    !is.na(alcohol_use_within_3_months_birth),
    !is.na(binge_drinking_within_3_months_birth)
  ) |>
  transmute(
    location,
    difference = alcohol_use_within_3_months_birth - binge_drinking_within_3_months_birth
  ) |>
  mutate(location = reorder(location, difference))

ggplot(state_overall, aes(x = location, y = difference)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray60") +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Gap Between Alcohol Use And Binge Drinking Estimates",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Alcohol use minus binge drinking"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
